investmentStory.title: Invest with clarity.
investmentStory.intro: Our investment offering provides individual, optimal solutions tailored to your budget, wishes, and goals.

chapters.title: Profitable. Flexible. Transparent.
chapters.body: We rely exclusively on selected investments that meet the highest quality criteria. Together with our national and international partner experts, we continuously monitor the complex and constantly changing financial market. Every strategy is regularly reviewed, challenged, and adapted to changing economic conditions. Our focus is not on short-lived trends, but on understandable concepts, solid structures, and the long-term objectives of our clients. Each investment solution is tailored to the available budget, personal expectations, desired flexibility, and individual investment horizon.
chapters.aside: Especially in an environment of low or volatile interest rates, well-designed investment solutions can create opportunities for regular and reasonably predictable distributions. Transparent costs, understandable decision-making foundations, and continuous communication remain essential.

chapters.title: Funds & Equities
chapters.body: The range of investment funds is extensive, spanning conservative solutions as well as products exposed to considerable volatility and risk. Because the security needs of our clients matter deeply, we maintain a deliberately conservative foundation. Before considering a solution, we analyze the investment concept, management quality, costs, risk structure, and long-term prospects. Our attention is directed toward solvent investments with understandable business models and realistic opportunities for sustainable income. Equities can provide substantial return potential, but they also require careful selection, continuous monitoring, and clearly defined risk limits.
chapters.aside: An experienced advisor with comprehensive knowledge of the relevant market segment is indispensable. Together, we determine which allocation to funds and equities fits the client's circumstances, risk tolerance, and financial objectives.

chapters.title: Land register, not savings book.
chapters.body: There are numerous ways to invest in real estate. The spectrum extends from open and closed real estate funds to developer models, investment apartments, private homes, and directly owned commercial properties. The appropriate form depends on several factors: available capital, disposable income, taxation, the intended investment horizon, and the personal need for security and flexibility. For this reason, every real estate investment is assessed individually, considering its opportunities, recurring income, financing structure, costs, and potential risks as one connected picture.
chapters.aside: Durability and value preservation make real estate particularly attractive. Property can offer inflation protection and, depending on the structure, potential tax benefits. These opportunities must always be assessed alongside location quality, intended use, market conditions, and long-term marketability.

chapters.title: Success, together.
chapters.body: We continuously seek investors interested in attractive, high-yield projects in national and international markets. Our collaboration begins with a clear understanding of personal expectations, available capital, and the desired risk profile. On this basis, we identify suitable projects and create transparent foundations for decision-making. We are committed to continuous and understandable communication with our partners. Openness, reliability, and regular information exchange are indispensable requirements for a trusted, effective, and successful long-term partnership.
chapters.aside: For concrete opportunities, we are pleased to provide a current project list and a tailored project exposé. To protect every involved party, detailed documentation is provided only after a confidentiality agreement has been signed.

investmentStory.closingTitle: Let us shape your investment strategy.

financingStory.title: Capital, precisely orchestrated.
financingStory.intro: A strong financing structure does more than secure capital. It protects liquidity, creates flexibility, and turns ambitious plans into achievable projects.

principles.title: Flexible from day one
principles.description: The right structure adapts to construction progress, changing needs, and long-term objectives instead of locking you into rigid conditions.

principles.title: Liquidity when it matters
principles.description: A clear liquidity plan makes capital available according to actual requirements while preserving a financial reserve for the unexpected.

principles.title: Conditions worth negotiating
principles.description: As an experienced premium banking partner, we compare structures, negotiate confidently, and identify opportunities for refinancing.

financingStory.flowDescription: For investment projects, repayment can be structured around the future earnings generated by the project itself. Capital is released as milestones are reached, while risks and participants remain clearly coordinated.
financingStory.optionsTitle: The right mix creates room to move.

options.title: Property financing
options.description: Tailored private and commercial property financing with attractive fixed-rate options and flexible repayment structures.

options.title: Refinancing
options.description: Existing financing is reviewed and renegotiated to release businesses from unfavorable long-term conditions.

options.title: Project financing
options.description: Complex national and international projects structured around expected future project earnings.

options.title: Alternative capital
options.description: Employee participation, corporate bonds, asset-backed securities, private loans, and crowdfunding can complement conventional financing.

financingStory.closingTitle: Let us structure what comes next.

sections.title: Section 1: Liability for website content
paragraphs: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under the general laws pursuant to Section 7(1) of the German Telemedia Act. Under Sections 8 to 10, however, we are not required to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or investigate circumstances indicating unlawful activity.

Obligations to remove or block information under general law remain unaffected. Liability is only possible from the time a specific infringement becomes known. Upon becoming aware of an infringement, we will remove the relevant content immediately.

sections.title: Section 2: Liability for links
paragraphs: Our website contains links to external third-party websites whose content is outside our control. We therefore cannot accept responsibility for third-party content. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for linked pages.

Linked pages were checked for possible legal violations when linked. Permanent monitoring is not reasonable without specific indications of an infringement. Upon becoming aware of an infringement, we will remove the relevant links immediately.

sections.title: Section 3: Copyright
paragraphs: Content and works created by the website operators are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution, or any exploitation outside copyright limits requires written consent from the relevant author or creator. Downloads and copies are permitted only for private, non-commercial use.

Where content was not created by the operator, third-party copyrights are respected and such content is identified. Please notify us of possible copyright infringements. Upon becoming aware of an infringement, we will remove the relevant content immediately.

sections.title: Section 4: Legal validity
paragraphs: This disclaimer is considered part of the website. If individual parts or formulations do not, no longer, or do not fully comply with applicable law, the remaining parts remain unaffected in content and validity.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The following information provides an overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit our website.
privacy.notice: This English translation is provided for convenience. The German version governs.

sections.title: Data protection at a glance
paragraphs: Personal data is any data that can identify you personally. Some data is collected when you provide it to us, for example through a contact form. Other data is automatically collected by IT systems when you visit the website. This mainly includes technical data such as browser, operating system, and time of access.
Some data is collected to ensure the website is provided securely and without technical errors.

sections.title: Controller
paragraphs: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is ProInvestment VermögenstreuhandgesmbH, Managing Director Wolfram Ruck, Ruckburg – Allgäustraße 5, 6912 Hörbranz, Austria.
Telephone: +43 (0)5573/84777-0. Fax: +43 (0)5573/84777-77. Email: office@proinvestment.at.

sections.title: General information
paragraphs: We take the protection of your personal data seriously and treat it confidentially and in accordance with applicable data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
Data transmitted over the internet, for example by email, may be subject to security vulnerabilities. Complete protection against third-party access is not possible.

sections.title: Your rights
paragraphs: Under applicable law, you have the right to receive information free of charge regarding your stored personal data, its origin, recipients, and processing purpose, as well as rights to rectification, restriction, or erasure where applicable.

You may withdraw consent at any time by sending an informal email. You also have a right to data portability and the right to lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority at dsb.gv.at.

sections.title: SSL or TLS encryption
paragraphs: For security and to protect confidential content, this website uses SSL or TLS encryption. An encrypted connection is indicated by the change from “http://” to “https://” and the browser's lock symbol.

sections.title: Cookies
paragraphs: This website may use technically necessary cookies. Cookies are small text files stored on your device and do not cause damage. Session cookies are automatically deleted after your visit.
You can configure your browser to notify you when cookies are set, allow cookies only in individual cases, reject them generally, or automatically delete them when closing the browser.

sections.title: Server log files
paragraphs: The website provider may automatically collect information in server log files transmitted by your browser. This includes browser type and version, operating system, referrer URL, hostname, server-request time, and IP address.

Processing is based on Article 6(1)(f) GDPR. There is a legitimate interest in the technically correct presentation, security, and optimisation of the website. This data is not combined with other data sources.

sections.title: Contact forms and enquiries
paragraphs: If you contact us through a contact form or by email, the information you provide, including your contact details, is stored to process your enquiry and possible follow-up questions. This data is not shared without your consent.

Processing is based on your consent under Article 6(1)(a) GDPR. The data remains with us until you request deletion, withdraw consent, or the purpose for storage ceases. Statutory retention obligations remain unaffected.

sections.title: Objection to promotional emails
paragraphs: The use of contact details published as part of legal-notice obligations for sending unsolicited advertising and informational materials is prohibited. We reserve the right to take legal action in the event of unsolicited promotional information.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Conditions governing the use of this website and the information it provides.
terms.notice: This English translation is provided for convenience. The German version governs.

sections.title: Scope
paragraphs: By using this website, you accept these terms of use. The content is intended only for persons whose access is permitted under the applicable legal system.

sections.title: No advice or recommendation
paragraphs: Information provided on this website is for general information only. It does not constitute investment, financing, tax, or legal advice, nor an offer or recommendation to buy or sell a financial instrument.

sections.title: Accuracy and availability
paragraphs: We seek to provide current and accurate information but do not guarantee completeness, accuracy, or continuous availability. Content may be changed or removed at any time.

sections.title: Risks and personal responsibility
paragraphs: Investments and financing involve risk. Past performance does not reliably indicate future results. Decisions must be made independently and following personal professional advice.

sections.title: Links and intellectual property
paragraphs: We accept no responsibility for external websites. All trademarks, text, images, and other content remain reserved to their respective rights holders.
